file_name: Garza-Flores et al. - 2019 - Spectral indexes obtained by implementation of the fractional Fourier and Hermite transform for the.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses fractional Fourier transform and Hermite transform to calculate spectral indexes for discriminating malignant melanoma from benign lesions. It does not employ AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods; it relies on signal processing and statistical analysis (box-whisker plots, sensitivity/specificity) of spectral features.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
